titleStmt.title: SII 28.134: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 134. (A.R. No. 289 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, north wall.

This record is inscribed on a surface where there was already an inscription of Vikramachōḻa starting with his meykīrtti, pūmālai-miḍaindu etc., after erasing it. Some portions and letters of the older inscription are visible and sometimes confuse the reading of the present inscription.

Records an order issued through Toṇḍaimāṉ addressed to the various authorities connected with the temple, authorising the appropriation of the produce on 4 vēli of land after paying an amount of paddy as agara-oṭṭu (register of the agaram ?) and tarappaḍi, which was the jīvitam of the regiment known as Vīra-rākshasa-vēḷaikkāṟar and after availing exemptions from pura-vargaṅgaḷ (extraneous levies ?) viz. kāttigaippachchai, paṇikkottu etc., on account of the concerned land becoming saline and thus becoming uncultivable due to the encroachment of the sea, to those tending the garden, named Paṭṭāla-dēvaṉ-tirunandavanam, after its donor (the land amounting to 4 vēlis was distributed in three hamlets Irājārāja-nallūr, and also exempting the land gifted for the purpose from the payment of extraneous levies (puṟavaṟgaṅgaḷ) as that land had been devastated by the encroachment of the sea. The land concerned amounting to 4 vēli was distributed in three hamlets, Irājarāja-nallūr, Paṉmāhēśvara-nallūr and Irājasūryya-nallūr, in agaram Irāja-sūryya-charuppēdimaṅgalam in Veṇṇaiyūrnāḍu in Rājārāja-vaḷanāḍu had been gifted as (maintenance) of those working in the garden, the tiruppaḷḷi-ddāma-tirunandavanam, which was to supply flowers for the (tiruppū-maṇḍapam,) set up by Ikkāṭṭu (Koṭṭur)kiḻāṉ, Vēḷāṉ Paṭṭālaka dēvan alias Chēdiyarāyaṉ of Pūṅguṉṟam in Kulōttuṅga-chōḻa-nallur alias Oḻugarai in Māttūr-nāḍu in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻamaṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ § Aṉaittulakuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya cuntarapāṇṭiya tevarkku Eḻāvatu nāḷ Irunūṟṟaimpattiraṇṭiṉāl toṇṭai
māṉ Olai teṉṉavaṉ pirāmārāyarumRead pirāmārāyarum jayatuṅkap pallavarayarum kurukulattarayarum UṭaiyāriRead uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār koyil cimā
heśvarak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum cikāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyilnāyakañceyvārkaḷum tirumāḷikaik
kūṟu ceyvārkaḷum paṇṭārappottakamuṭaiyārkaḷum kaṇakkarum kaṇṭu viṭutantatāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu māttūr nā
ṭṭu Oḻukaṟaiyāṉa kulottuṅka coḻanallūr pūṅkuṉṟattu IkāṭṭukkiḻāṉSee No. 137 below the reading may be koṭṭurkiḻāṉveḷāṉpaṭṭālaka tevaṉāṉa cetiyarāyaṉ tiruppūmaṇṭapa
ttukku mutalākat tiruppaḷḷittāmam Aḷakka perumpaṟṟappuliyūr Aḻakiya tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ tiruvitiyil kiḻaittiruvitiyil teṉtuṇṭattuk kiḻciṟaki
l puḷiyampāṭip peruvaḻikkut teṟku civaṉai muḻuttumuṭaiyāḷ tiruvoṭaikku vaṭakkup paṭṭaṭuttu muṉṉāḷil ceyvitta tiruppaḷḷittāmat tirunantava
ṉamāy tiruppaḷḷittāmam Aḷaṉtu varukiṟa paṭṭāla tevaṉtirunantavaṉañ ceyyun tiruttoṇṭarkaḷukku juvaṉattukku Uṭalāka Aṭi nāyakar tirukkaṇcāttiṉāl
tirumuṉpu kāṭcikku Uṭalāka tevadāṉam Irājādhirāja vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇaiyūr nāṭṭu Akaram Irājasūryyac caruppetimaṅkalattuppiṭākai Irācarāca nallūrilu paṉmā
heśvaranallūrilum Irājasūryya nallūrilum Aḻakiya maṇavāḷabhaṭṭaṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭu tirunantavaṉappuṟamāka Iṉṉāḷil viṭṭa nilam nālveliyum Ivarkaḷ tāṅkaḷḷe
payir ceytu Ivvūril Akara Oṭṭuppaṭi tarappaṭiyāl vanta nellu virarākṣasa veḷaikkāṟarkku jivitamāka Aṭaittu jivitakāṟarkku Iṟukkumpaṭiye Iṟukkavum ni
kkiyuḷḷatu Ivarkaḷukku koṟṟukkum tirumuṉpu kāṭcikku Uṭalākavum maṟṟu Iṉṉilattukku Iṟukkum puṟauṭal kāttikaippaccai paṇikkottu Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṉaittu vaṟkaṅkaḷuṭaṉ
Iṉṉilam kaṭalaṉaittaRead kaṭalaṇaittaŪrāy Il lippūṭum Irāvaṇaṉ movāyum kaṭalum kaṭalamuḷḷiyum Eḻuttu maṇalkuṉṟum Uvarntu pāḻumākaiyil Iṉṉilattukku
Ivvaṟkaṅkaḷ Iṟukkal Ittirunantavaṉañceykiṟa Ivarkaḷukku jīvaṉam potāmaiyil Innilattukku Inta Akara Oṭṭuppaṭi nellu jīvitakāṟarkku Iṟukkavum I
ppuṟavaṟkaṅkaḷ taviravum Ippaṭikku kulottuṅkacoḻaṉ tirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭavum paṇṇuvate Ippaṭi ceyyap paṇṇavate miḻalaik kūṟṟattuk kiḻkuṟṟu ma
ñcakkuṭaiyāṉ Uyyavantāṉ tirunokkaḻakiyāṉāṉa toṇṭaimāṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟu Eḻutiṉāṉ tiṭṭu tirumāḷikai mulataṉattuk kottatu ḥ §
Digital edition of SII 28.134 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
